3095100.name: Eternal Nightmares
3095100.description:
Welcome to Eternal Nightmares, a 3D horror game where you enter a world where the night never ends. Your task is to explore dark streets and abandoned houses, preventing fear from taking over you.

In this game, you are surrounded by a silent evil that lurks at every corner. Navigate through the eerie environment with user-friendly controls, and immerse yourself in the atmospheric and foreboding 3D graphics.

Game Features:

Silent Evil: Encounter a pervasive, silent evil that awaits you at every turn.
3D Graphics: Experience the immersive and atmospheric visual style.
User-Friendly Controls: Easily navigate the dark, foreboding world.
